claim: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR is a 600M parameter model that replaces self-hosted speech-to-text stacks and handles 40 languages from one checkpoint
actionable: Replace separate self-hosted ASR models with Nemotron 3.5, which supports 40 languages and handles multilingual streaming from a single 600M parameter checkpoint
source_title: The NEW Best ASR - NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR

claim: Cache-aware streaming reduces ASR latency by 17x by reusing encoder self-attention states instead of reprocessing overlapping audio chunks
actionable: When deploying streaming ASR, use cache-aware models that cache encoder activations between chunks rather than processing overlapping audio repeatedly
source_title: The NEW Best ASR - NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR

claim: ASR chunk size (80ms to 1s) is an inference-time tuning parameter that trades latency for accuracy without retraining
actionable: Tune ASR chunk size at inference time: use 80ms for low-latency word-by-word transcription, 320-560ms for balanced performance, or 1s+ for maximum accuracy with longer response times
source_title: The NEW Best ASR - NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR

claim: Word boosting at decode-time (without retraining) increases accuracy for rare words like product names, drug names, and proper names that were underrepresented in training
actionable: Use decode-time word boosting to inject domain-specific terminology (product names, surnames, uncommon words) as a probability bias without fine-tuning or retraining
source_title: The NEW Best ASR - NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR

claim: Streaming ASR punctuation and capitalization quality is poor even on best models; production systems should not rely on them
actionable: For production streaming ASR, post-process transcripts with a separate capitalization and punctuation model rather than relying on the streaming ASR model's output
source_title: The NEW Best ASR - NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR

claim: 8 languages in Nemotron require fine-tuning (adaptation) to work well despite pre-training; base model accuracy is poor without fine-tuning
actionable: If targeting low-resource languages (like Thai) in Nemotron 3.5, plan for fine-tuning on domain data rather than expecting base model to perform adequately
source_title: The NEW Best ASR - NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR
